_description: AC-6 parity fixture: a trailing-stop exit. Tick 0 arms the position (mc in [TAKE_PROFIT_MC_PCT, TRIGGER_THRESHOLD_PCT) = [5,15)). Ticks 1+ drop the return deep below the HWM-anchored stop with mc held well below MC_SANITY_THRESHOLD (60) so the MC veto does not block — the trailing stop confirms after EXIT_CONFIRM_TICKS qualifying ticks. Input tick sequence only; the parity test asserts the production harness and the replay produce the SAME exit decision on the SAME tick. No producer-computed value is encoded here.
_provenance: Hand-derived input sequence. Schema = synthetic_history tick dict: {time, return, mc_prob, vol, vwap_diff, base_atr_pct, valid_vwap_weight}. grace_minutes is the open-window grace; 0 here so the (absent) VWAP signal is never the variable under test.
